lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX loadout, hardpoint sizes and power/capacitor budget.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Python ship page — manufacturer specs, hull/shield figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, the zero-military-slot count and module-variant data behind the AX reinforcement plan.

sources.label: Inara — Python
sources.what: Ship overview: base stats, internals layout, hardpoints, price, and the no-rank access used in the AX cost notes.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Python hull profile and combat notes, cross-referenced against AX/Guardian weapon fitting for this role.
